reviews.comment:
Hay poco estacionamiento para las visitas solo seis lugares. La confitería recomendable, atención rápida, amena y de precios normales.

(Translated by Google)
There's limited parking for visitors, only six spaces. The confectionery shop is recommended; the service is quick, friendly, and the prices are reasonable.

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Por momentos está muy llena y hay poco lugar para acceder. Voy seguido porque soy socio del ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Good service. At times it's very crowded and there's not much room to get in. I go often because I'm an ACA member.

reviews.comment:
Bien puesto aunque incómodo para entrar con el auto a cargar si hay cola. quisieron ponerle de todo a la playa y no hay tanto lugar

(Translated by Google)
Well set up, although it's inconvenient to drive in to load up if there's a queue. They tried to cram everything into the beach, but there's not enough space.
